_comment: ACTIVE ensemble config (decorrelated agreement). Routes i3rab/tashkeel/consonant through >=k member agreement above per-member FP-safe thresholds. PROVISIONAL: the member set + thresholds were selected on the ~206-word careful sessions and are OVERFIT (held-out CV: i3rab ~92, tashkeel ~86, consonant ~88, FP ~2.5%). Pending general-dataset validation. SAFE TO DEPLOY: load_ensemble_or_engine resolves these member dirs relative to this file; if any used member ('base','i3rab_v2','consv2','consfix') is missing on disk it falls back to single-model and logs, so a server with only 'base' present runs exactly as before. Drop the member dirs in next to this file and the full ensemble auto-activates on next startup. The 5 non-base members currently live on the region-locked RunPod volume (29p3s0lzcq, US-IL-1).
